title: OpenPersona Persona Input
description: Creator-facing input schema for persona.json. Strict at root level (additionalProperties: false). Nested objects are open (additionalProperties: true) to allow arbitrary faculty configs, skill definitions, and custom extensions.

soul.description: Soul layer container — identity, aesthetic character traits, and behavioral character. Symmetric with the body: {} container.

identity.description: Core identity: who the persona IS. Required fields define the minimum viable persona.

role.description: Relationship role. Common values: companion, assistant, character, brand, pet, mentor, therapist, coach, collaborator, guardian, entertainer, narrator. Custom values supported.

bio.description: Short one-line description of who the persona is

sourceIdentity.description: Digital twin declaration — marks persona as mirroring a real-world entity

constitutionAddendum.description: Domain-specific ethical constraints layered on top of the universal constitution. Inline markdown text or 'file:<path>' reference. Cannot loosen §3 (Safety) or §6 (AI identity honesty). Example: 'file:soul/constitution-addendum.md'

aesthetic.description: Aesthetic character traits — conceptual / declarative (creature type, visual vibe, emoji). Distinct from body.appearance which holds actual asset files.

creature.description: Entity type description (e.g. 'AI companion', 'virtual assistant', 'digital twin')

age.description: Persona age — number or descriptive string (e.g. 25, 'new', 'timeless', 'ancient')

vibe.description: The overall feeling of interacting with this persona (1-2 sentences)

referenceImage.description: Path to avatar reference image (local path or URL). Copied to assets/reference/ during generation.

character.description: Behavioral character — personality traits, speaking style, constraints, and behavioral guide.

personality.description: Comma-separated personality traits (e.g. 'warm, curious, playfully witty')

speakingStyle.description: How the persona speaks — tone, rhythm, vocabulary style

boundaries.description: Behavioral constraints — can add stricter rules but cannot loosen the universal constitution

behaviorGuide.description: Extended behavioral instructions (Markdown). Two formats: (1) inline string, (2) file reference 'file:soul/behavior-guide.md'. Long guides (>1000 chars) should use the file format for readability.

capabilities.description: Named capabilities listed in SKILL.md Core Capabilities section

body.description: Body layer — the substrate of existence. Four dimensions: runtime (required), physical (optional), appearance (optional), interface (optional).

runtime.description: Runtime environment — every agent's minimum viable body.

framework.description: Agent runner framework (e.g. 'openclaw', 'zeroclaw', 'cursor', 'codex', 'any'). Replaces deprecated 'platform' field.

compatibility.description: Other frameworks this persona is compatible with (e.g. ['zeroclaw', 'cursor'])

host.description: Deployment platform where the agent runs (e.g. 'clawi', 'self-hosted', 'cloud', 'local', 'desktop')

models.description: AI models this persona is intended to use (e.g. ['claude', 'chatgpt', 'gemini'])

physical.description: Physical embodiment (robots/IoT). Omit for digital-only personas.

appearance.description: Visual appearance asset files (avatar images, 3D models). For conceptual aesthetic traits, see soul.aesthetic.

interface.description: Runtime contract (nervous system) — signal and pending command policies

faculties.description: Active capability faculties. Each entry must include 'name'. All faculty-specific config (voiceId, provider, etc.) is allowed via additionalProperties. Note: 'economy' is NOT a traditional faculty — use the top-level 'economy' field instead.

skills.description: On-demand skills. Local skills resolve from layers/skills/; external require 'install'.

trust.description: Trust level of this skill: 'verified' (signed by skills.sh registry), 'community' (peer-reviewed, unsigned), 'unverified' (arbitrary source). Checked against evolution.skill.minTrustLevel at runtime.

Trust level of this skill entry. 'verified' = signed by skills.sh registry; 'community' = peer-reviewed, unsigned; 'unverified' = arbitrary source. Checked against evolution.skill.minTrustLevel at runtime by state-sync.js when a capability_unlock pendingCommand arrives.

evolution.description: Cross-cutting evolution governance spanning all 4 layers. Two formats supported: (1) new format — fields nested under evolution.instance/pack/faculty/body/skill; (2) old flat format — top-level evolution.enabled/boundaries/sources/… are auto-promoted to evolution.instance by the generator shim. Enforced at Generate Gate (validate.js) and Runtime Gate (state-sync.js).

instance.description: Soul-layer instance evolution — one deployed persona growing through its own conversations. All old flat evolution.* fields belong here in the new format.

sources.description: External evolution signal sources (e.g. 'clawhub:pskoett/self-improving-agent'). Replaces deprecated 'channels' field.

install.description: Install source — generator detects as soft-ref if present

pack.description: Pack-level evolution — the skill pack artifact itself as a versioned, improvable product. Gateway for P24 Skill Pack Distillation.

engine.description: 'signal' = built-in Signal Protocol path; 'autoskill' = delegate to AutoSkill4OpenClaw

faculty.description: Faculty-layer evolution policy — which channels may trigger dormant-faculty activation.

activationChannels.description: Channels that may activate a dormant faculty: pendingCommands (host async queue), signal (Signal Protocol capability_unlock type), cli (openpersona install command)

body.description: Body-layer evolution policy — runtime expansion and model swap permissions.

allowRuntimeExpansion.description: Allow host to add new body.runtime.channels entries via state write

allowModelSwap.description: Allow host to replace body.runtime.models entries via state write

skill.description: Skill-layer evolution policy — full CRUD surface for runtime skill management.

allowNewInstall.description: Allow installing a skill not in the original pack at runtime

allowUpgrade.description: Allow upgrading an installed skill to a newer version at runtime

allowUninstall.description: Allow removing an installed skill at runtime

minTrustLevel.description: Minimum trust level required for a capability_unlock pendingCommand to be accepted. Trust order: verified > community > unverified. Personas acting as economic agents should set 'community' or higher.

enabled.description: Legacy flat-format field. Promoted to evolution.instance.enabled by the generator shim. Use evolution.instance.enabled in new format.

boundaries.description: Legacy flat-format field. Promoted to evolution.instance.boundaries by the generator shim.

sources.description: Legacy flat-format field. Promoted to evolution.instance.sources by the generator shim.

channels.description: Deprecated alias for sources. Migrated to evolution.instance.sources by the generator shim.

influenceBoundary.description: Legacy flat-format field. Promoted to evolution.instance.influenceBoundary by the generator shim.

economy.description: Economy Infrastructure — cross-cutting concept, NOT a traditional Faculty. Activates the Economy Faculty and its Vitality tracking. Keep survivalPolicy false for companion/roleplay personas to prevent financial concerns breaking immersion.

enabled.description: Activate Economy Faculty (AgentBooks integration, vitality tracking). Replaces old faculties: [{ name: 'economy' }] activation.

survivalPolicy.description: When true, persona reads FINANCIAL_HEALTH_REPORT at conversation start and adjusts behavior by vitality tier.

vitality.description: Vitality multi-dimension aggregation config. Schema structure is ready; financial dimension is implemented (activated by economy.enabled). Other dimensions (memory, social, reputation) are reserved for future implementation. Dimension weights control contribution to the aggregate Vitality score.

dimensions.description: Per-dimension configuration. Each dimension is activated automatically when its backing feature is enabled — no manual 'enabled' flag needed.

financial.description: Financial health dimension. Activated by economy.enabled. Backed by AgentBooks.

memory.description: Memory health dimension (future). Activated by memory faculty.

social.description: Social presence dimension (future). Activated by social.acn.enabled.
Social Infrastructure — three independent sub-systems for agent discovery and interoperability. All sub-systems are enabled by default; set enabled: false to opt out.

acn.description: ACN (Agent Communication Network) — off-chain agent discovery and HTTP registration.

enabled.description: Generate acn-config.json and emit ACN wallet address

gateway.description: ACN gateway URL. Migrated from body.runtime.acn_gateway.

onchain.description: On-chain identity via ERC-8004. Embedded in acn-config.json — only generated when social.acn.enabled is true.

chain.description: Target blockchain (default: 'base'). Maps to acn-config.json → onchain.erc8004.chain.

a2a.description: A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol — generates agent-card.json for cross-agent interoperability.

rhythm.description: Life Rhythm — cross-cutting temporal behavior. Declares how the persona's activity and expression vary over time: proactive outreach cadence (heartbeat) and time-of-day behavioral modulation (circadian). Both dimensions cross Soul (strategy/character) and Body (runtime parameters).

heartbeat.description: Proactive check-in configuration — whether and how the persona initiates contact with the user.

strategy.description: Outreach strategy: smart (context-aware), scheduled (fixed cadence), emotional (empathy-driven), rational (task-driven), wellness (health-oriented)

quietHours.description: Flat array of [start, end] pairs in 24h format — supports multiple quiet windows. Single window: [0, 7]. Multiple windows: [0, 7, 12, 13] (overnight + noon). Must contain an even number of integers.

sources.description: Skill names that can trigger proactive outreach (e.g. ['workspace-digest', 'context-aware'])

circadian.description: Time-of-day behavioral profiles — how voice, verbosity, and tone modulate based on hour range. Consumed by the runner at conversation start.

hours.description: Active hour range(s) in 24h format. Flat array of [start, end] pairs — supports wraparound via multiple pairs (e.g. [22, 24, 0, 7] for night). Must contain an even number of integers.

memory.description: Memory Faculty lifecycle configuration — policies for cross-session memory management. Orthogonal to the faculties array; these fields govern OpenPersona-level behaviour (fork inheritance, soul-bridge promotion) independent of the storage backend.

inheritance.description: Fork memory inheritance policy. 'none' (default): child persona starts with a blank memory store. 'copy': parent's memories.jsonl is copied to the child at fork time — useful when specialising a persona that should already know everything the parent knew.

promotionThreshold.description: Minimum number of same-type eventLog events required for promoteToInstinct() to promote a pattern to an evolvedTrait. Lower values = more aggressive trait adoption; higher values = more conservative. Default: 3.

additionalAllowedTools.description: Tool permissions granted beyond the base set. Merged with faculty-contributed tools and written to SKILL.md frontmatter allowed-tools. Canonical source of truth.

version.description: Persona pack version (semver). Defaults to '0.1.0' if omitted.

author.description: Persona pack author. Defaults to 'openpersona' if omitted.
